_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: At 32h GRD expression significantly reduces Ras-GTP and downstream P-MEK and P-ERK, while cell death induced by exogenous high-level expression of NF1-GRD is not yet present
details: At 32h after NF1-GRD infection, showed significantly reduced Ras-GTP and downstream P-MEK and P-ERK without cell death
